diagrams.title: File Access Methods Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the difference between sequential and random file access
elements: Sequential Access Arrow flowing from Start through records 1,2,3,4,5
Random Access showing direct jumps from Start to Record N
Seek operation indicator for random access
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to use each access method

diagrams.title: Open File Table Structure
diagrams.description: Illustrates how file descriptors and open file tables work
elements: System Open File Table entries with file pointer, mode, FCB pointer
File Control Blocks storing actual file attributes

diagrams.title: File Operations Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequence of file operations from creation to closing
